headline: How The Truist Financial (TFC) Story Is Shifting As Analyst Views Diverge
summary: The latest update keeps Truist Financial's published fair value estimate steady at $55.67, while analyst price targets around the stock have been moving in different directions. Some researchers are trimming targets on valuation concerns, while others are nudging them higher as they revisit assumptions about the core banking business and earnings stability. As you read on, you will see how this evolving mix of target cuts and hikes shapes the broader narrative and what to watch to stay on top...

headline: Grandbridge launches Master Servicing following ratings approval, expanding Truist's Commercial Mortgage Servicing Business
summary: Grandbridge Real Estate Capital, a wholly owned subsidiary of Truist Bank and Truist Bank's parent company, Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC), today announced the launch of its Master Servicing platform. This marks a significant expansion in Grandbridge's commercial mortgage servicing capability and further strengthens Truist as a national leader in commercial real estate.

headline: Truist adds BofA alum Cathy Bessant to board
summary: The 40-year Bank of America veteran retired from that bank in 2023 as vice chair of global strategy. She unquestionably ranked among the top women banking execs in the late 2010s and early 2020s.
